accepted_icd10_categories: Congenital anomalies affecting unrelated organ systems
Autism spectrum disorder with syndromic features

medical_necessity_criteria.description: Genetic etiology is considered most likely based on clinical evaluation
Board-certified/board-eligible Medical Geneticist consultation (neurologist or developmental pediatrician acceptable for developmental delay cases)
Pre- and post-test genetic counseling by independent provider
Alternate etiologies have been considered and ruled out when possible
Clinical presentation does not fit single-gene or targeted panel conditions
WES/WGS is more efficient than ordering separate tests
Standard clinical workup has been completed (excluding invasive procedures)
Testing must guide prognosis, clinical decision-making, reduce diagnostic uncertainty, or inform reproductive counseling
Multiple congenital abnormalities affecting unrelated organ systems
Bilateral sensorineural hearing loss (nonsyndromic) with negative/inconclusive targeted panel
Autism spectrum disorder with syndromic features and prior negative/inconclusive CGH or panel testing
Epilepsy meeting specific requirements: age 21 or under, intractable or early-onset, prior testing negative

required_documentation: Board-certified Medical Geneticist consultation note (or neurologist/developmental pediatrician for dev delay)
Post-test genetic counseling documentation (for results disclosure)
Clinical notes documenting alternate etiologies considered and ruled out
Documentation of standard clinical workup completed
Prior genetic testing results (if targeted panel was performed)
Clinical justification for why WES/WGS is more efficient than separate tests
ordering_provider_requirements: Board-certified or board-eligible Medical Geneticist consultation required
Neurologist or developmental pediatrician acceptable for developmental delay cases
prior_testing_requirements: Alternate etiologies considered and ruled out when possible
Standard clinical workup completed (excluding invasive procedures)
Prior negative/inconclusive targeted panel for certain indications (hearing loss, ASD, epilepsy)
exclusions: Clear precipitating events for hypoxic-ischemic encephalopathy
WGS after non-diagnostic WES (negligible diagnostic yield)
